name: hubspot-data-handling
description: Implement HubSpot GDPR compliance, data export, and contact privacy operations. Use when handling GDPR/CCPA data subject requests, implementing data export, contact deletion, or privacy-compliant HubSpot integrations. Trigger with phrases like "hubspot GDPR", "hubspot data export", "hubspot delete contact", "hubspot privacy", "hubspot CCPA", "hubspot PII".
